items.name: kam-containment
items.title: kam-ui containment
items.description: Viewport pause + motion/hover query hooks for specimens.

items.name: chromatic-leaks
items.title: Chromatic Leaks
items.description: Four animated corner radials — each leaks colour from its corner while leaving the composition centre transparent. Independent Lissajous drift and breathing per radial, with mouse-parallax follow.

items.name: halo-ring
items.title: Halo Ring
items.description: Animated radial ring — transparent centre, glowing colour band, transparent outer zone. The band breathes, the ring drifts, the centre follows the cursor.

items.name: shimmer-ring
items.title: Shimmer Ring
items.description: WebGL shader ring — transparent centre, noise-shimmered colour band, transparent outer zone. Angle-dependent simplex noise deforms the band edges so the ring is never a perfect circle.

items.name: crown-glow
items.title: Crown Glow
items.description: WebGL shader halo whose centre is above the visible canvas — only the lower arc shows, creating a glowing crown at the top of the composition. Two concentric rings shimmer with noise.

items.name: chromatic-field
items.title: Chromatic Field
items.description: Procedural organic domain-warp field with rotating light streaks. RGB channels are sampled at offset UVs to produce chromatic aberration — lens-split colour fringing at every bright edge. Dark cinematic palette.

items.name: solar-flare
items.title: Solar Flare
items.description: Procedural WebGL sun: limb-darkened photosphere, chromosphere band, fibrous corona from radial noise sampling, activity via flareCount. Warm accent on deep space.

items.name: radiant-veil
items.title: Radiant Veil
items.description: Transparent radial overlay with Lissajous drift. CSS vars + rAF — the coloured fringe moves while the centre stays clear.

items.name: mesh-gradient
items.title: Mesh Gradient
items.description: Four soft colour blobs drift on simplex-noise paths, blending like liquid paint. WebGL shader with cubic hermite falloff. Subtle film grain adds analog texture.

items.name: atmospheric-sky
items.title: Atmospheric Sky
items.description: Procedural atmospheric sky — Rayleigh/Mie scattering, animated sun, day/night cycle with cirrus clouds, crepuscular rays, sun bloom, and twinkling stars. All analytic, no precomputed textures.

items.name: milky-way
items.title: Milky Way
items.description: Milky Way panorama from ESA Gaia DR2 colour data projected onto a sky dome. Procedural star overlay, slow galactic rotation. Requires public/milky-way/milky-way.jpg (~945 KB) — download from the kam-ui repo.

items.name: black-hole
items.title: Black Hole
items.description: Schwarzschild black hole + accretion disc (Eric Bruneton beam-tracing shader, BSD-3-Clause). Ships TS + GLSL; copy public/black-hole/*.dat from kam-ui or rebuild with github.com/ebruneton/black_hole_shader. WebGL2 float extensions + Vite ?raw imports required.
